ast.name: error
ast.source: [Note Navigator] Failed to update attachment folder fade:
ast.target: [笔记导航器] 更新附件文件夹淡化失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Note Navigator] Failed to cleanup attachment folder fade:
ast.target: [笔记导航器] 清理附件文件夹淡化失败：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sorted files in the current folder:
ast.target: 当前文件夹中已排序的文件：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Navigate through files in the entire vault or just within the active folder.
ast.target: 在整个保险库或仅在活动文件夹内导航文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the attachment folder less noticeable in the file explorer.
ast.target: 使附件文件夹在文件资源管理器中不那么显眼。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete unreferenced attachments when their associated note is deleted.
ast.target: 当关联的笔记被删除时，自动删除未引用的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically navigate to the next file in sort order of the file-explorer after deletion. Disable to use Obsidian's default behavior.
ast.target: 删除后，自动导航到文件资源管理器排序顺序中的下一个文件。禁用此选项以使用 Obsidian 的默认行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete folders that become empty after deleting notes or attachments.
ast.target: 删除笔记或附件后，自动删除变为空的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of parent directories to traverse when looking for empty folders to delete (1-10).
ast.target: 查找要删除的空文件夹时要遍历的父目录层数 (1-10)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting files or folders.
ast.target: 删除文件或文件夹前显示确认对话框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification for each deleted file or folder.
ast.target: 为每个删除的文件或文件夹显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable verbose console logging for debugging purposes.
ast.target: 为调试目的启用详细的控制台日志记录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all counters for deleted files, folders, and navigations.
ast.target: 重置所有已删除文件、文件夹和导航的计数器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assign hotkeys to the plugin commands for easier use.
ast.target: 为插件命令分配快捷键以便于使用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid sort order found. Using default alphabetical sort.
ast.target: 发现无效的排序顺序。使用默认的字母顺序排序。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No parent folder found for the current file.
ast.target: 未找到当前文件的父文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A file must be active to navigate.
ast.target: 必须有一个活动文件才能导航。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动的编辑器可供滚动。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error loading Note Navigator plugin settings. Using defaults.
ast.target: 加载笔记导航器插件设置时出错。使用默认值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error saving Note Navigator plugin settings.
ast.target: 保存笔记导航器插件设置时出错。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A file must be open in the active editor.
ast.target: 必须在活动编辑器中打开一个文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred while navigating or deleting the file.
ast.target: 导航或删除文件时发生错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file or folder to debug sorting.
ast.target: 没有活动的文件或文件夹可用于调试排序。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug logging is disabled. Enable it in settings to see more debug information.
ast.target: 调试日志记录已禁用。在设置中启用它以查看更多调试信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Debug information logged to console. Check the developer console for details.
ast.target: 调试信息已记录到控制台。请检查开发者控制台以获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file or parent folder found.
ast.target: 未找到活动文件或父文件夹。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Delete current file and navigate to next note
ast.target: 删除当前文件并导航到下一条笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将消息记录到控制台（调试）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move current file and navigate to next note
ast.target: 移动当前文件并导航到下一条笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rename parent folder of current note
ast.target: 重命名当前笔记的父文件夹

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move parent folder and navigate to next note
ast.target: 移动父文件夹并导航到下一条笔记
